title: Zosterophyllanthos jupiter
taxonomy: Zosterophyllanthos jupiter belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is a genus of flowering plants, specifically a type of succulent. The classification of Zosterophyllanthos jupiter is within the order Malpighiales. This plant is native to Western Australia and is often found in arid regions. The genus Zosterophyllanthos is a relatively small group of plants with limited species distribution.
